summary: Tested 1099-NEC email with PDF attachment feature. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend E2E tests created but login flow is flaky due to splash screen timing issues.

test_results.frontend: Manual verification passed - E2E tests created but login flow timing issues

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and unique UUIDs, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1099-NEC email with PDF attachment feature fully tested via backend API tests. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/financials/issued-1099s/{entry_id}/email generates PDF and attaches it to email, 2) Email uses filed document when form_type='filed' and filed_document_id exists, 3) Entry is marked as emailed after successful send with emailed=true, emailed_at, emailed_to fields, 4) PDF generation endpoint works correctly, 5) Filed document upload marks entry as filed. Frontend E2E spec created at /app/tests/e2e/issued-1099s-email.spec.ts but login flow has timing issues with splash screen.

email_1099_draft_success.details: POST /api/financials/issued-1099s/{entry_id}/email with form_type='draft' generates PDF and sends email

email_marks_entry_as_emailed.details: After email sent, entry has emailed=true, emailed_at timestamp, emailed_to email address

email_filed_uses_uploaded_document.details: When form_type='filed' and filed_document_id exists, email uses the uploaded filed document

upload_filed_document.details: POST /api/financials/issued-1099s/{entry_id}/upload-filed stores document and marks entry as filed

generate_pdf.details: GET /api/financials/issued-1099s/{entry_id}/generate-pdf returns PDF with correct content-type

crud_operations.details: GET, POST, DELETE for issued-1099s all working correctly
